cookieBanner.description: Utilizamos cookies para melhorar a sua experiência e analisar o uso do site. A sua privacidade é importante para nós. Pode personalizar as suas preferências abaixo.
cookieBanner.essentialDesc: Necessários para a funcionalidade básica do site e segurança. Não podem ser desativados.
cookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Ajudam-nos a entender como utiliza o nosso site para que possamos melhorar a sua experiência.
cookieBanner.message: Utilizamos cookies para melhorar a sua experiência. Ao continuar, concorda com a nossa

home.errorTitle: Não foi possível carregar os dados da página inicial
home.errorBody: Atualize e tente novamente em alguns momentos.
home.heroTitle: A privacidade de um lar. O serviço de um hotel.
home.heroBody: Alojamentos cuidadosamente selecionados em Portugal, cada um operado de ponta a ponta pela nossa equipa interna. O seu chef privado está pronto. O seu concierge é local. Você apenas chega.
home.heroGuarantee: Sem taxas de reserva. Melhor preço garantido. Resposta do concierge em menos de 1 hora.
home.uspServiceSub: Chef privado, spa, limpeza. Tudo interno.
home.uspLocalSub: O seu concierge vive aqui. Suporte 24/7.
home.uspRateSub: Reserve diretamente. Sem comissões. Sem intermediários.
home.homesTitle: Uma coleção selecionada dos mais belos alojamentos privados de Portugal.
home.homesBody: Cada alojamento é pessoalmente selecionado, profissionalmente preparado e continuamente gerido pela nossa equipa. Não está a reservar uma casa. Está a reservar uma experiência.
home.statRating: Classificação de hóspedes em mais de 2.000 avaliações
home.howItWorksTitle: Três passos para o seu hotel privado.
home.step1Body: Navegue pela nossa coleção. Filtre por destino, tamanho e estilo. Cada alojamento cumpre o mesmo padrão operacional.
home.step2Body: Chef privado? Transferência do aeroporto? Aulas de surf para as crianças? O nosso concierge planeia tudo antes da sua chegada.
home.step3Body: Do momento em que pousa até ao momento em que parte, a nossa equipa local está no terreno. Você não faz nada além de desfrutar.
home.conceptTitle: Não é um hotel. Não é um aluguel. Algo melhor.
home.conceptBody: Cada alojamento na nossa coleção é operado como um hotel privado. Uma equipa local dedicada cuida de tudo, desde a cesta de boas-vindas na chegada até um chef privado a cozinhar com ingredientes do mercado de esta manhã. Sem receções. Sem átrios partilhados. Apenas o seu alojamento, o seu ritmo, as suas regras.
home.conceptPoint1Body: Sem espaços partilhados, sem horários. A propriedade inteira é exclusivamente sua.
home.conceptPoint2: O serviço de um hotel de cinco estrelas
home.conceptPoint2Body: Chef privado, spa na vila, concierge, limpeza, transferências. Cada serviço prestado pelos nossos profissionais treinados, internos.
home.conceptPoint3Body: A nossa equipa vive nas regiões onde operamos. Conhecem as praias ocultas, os restaurantes antes de aparecerem nos guias, os produtores que não anunciam.
home.destBody: Desde a selvagem linha costeira do Atlântico do Minho até ao sul ensolarado do Algarve, cada alojamento cumpre o mesmo padrão de qualidade, serviço e cuidado.
home.expTitle: A sua estadia é apenas o começo.
home.expGastronomyBody: De uma mesa de chef em casa a degustações de vinhos no Douro.
home.expWellnessBody: Massagens na vila, yoga privado, treino pessoal. Todos profissionais treinados PA.
home.expAdventureBody: Aulas de surf, passeios a cavalo, canyoning em vales ocultos. Guiado por locais.
home.expMobilityBody: Transferências de aeroporto, motorista privado, road trips curadas em Portugal.
home.ownersTitle: Tem uma propriedade notável em Portugal?
home.ownersBody: Estabelecemos parcerias com proprietários que compartilham a nossa visão de hospitalidade. O nosso modelo de gestão oferece retornos excecionais sem envolvimento operacional de sua parte. Equipas internas, padrões de qualidade hoteleira e uma marca que atrai hóspedes premium o ano todo.
home.ownersCta: SAIBA MAIS SOBRE O NOSSO MODELO
home.newsletterBody: Sem spam. Um email por mês. Cancele a subscrição a qualquer momento.
home.newsletterSuccess: Bem-vindo à família. Verifique a sua caixa de entrada para uma confirmação.

contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your trip. Our concierge team responds within 2 hours, 24/7.
contact.messageSentBody: Our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.faq1a: Within 2 hours, 24/7. For urgent matters during your stay, our local team can be at your door within 30 minutes.
contact.faq2q: Can I visit the property before booking?
contact.faq2a: Yes. We offer virtual walkthroughs on request, and in person visits can be arranged depending on availability.
contact.faq3q: Do you offer long term stays?
contact.faq3a: Yes. Extended stay rates available for bookings of 28 nights or more. Contact our concierge for a tailored proposal.
contact.faq4q: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq4a: Bank transfer, Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Apple Pay.
contact.faq5a: Typically 3 nights, varying by property and season. Our concierge will confirm for your selected dates.
contact.faq6q: Do you work with travel agents?
contact.faq6a: Yes. We have a trade programme with dedicated support and competitive commissions. Contact us for details.

about.heroTitle: We believe homes should feel like hotels. And hotels should feel like home.
about.storyP1: Portugal Active started with a straightforward observation. Portugal has some of the most beautiful private homes in Europe, but most of them are rented out with no service, no consistency, and no one standing behind the experience.
about.storyP2: We set out to change that. We partner with homeowners who share our standards and operate their properties as private hotels. Full time housekeeping staff, maintenance teams, concierge support, and a 47 point preparation checklist that runs before every single arrival.
about.storyP3: Today, we manage over 50 homes across three regions of Portugal, with a team of more than 30 professionals. Every property is personally inspected. Every guest receives the same standard of care. Every stay is designed to feel effortless, because behind the scenes, our team is making sure nothing is left to chance.
about.storyP4: We do not list homes on a marketplace and hope for the best. We operate each property, end to end, with our own people.
about.modelP1: We do not list homes on a platform and wait. We operate each property as a private hotel, with in house staff, daily inspections, professional housekeeping, and a concierge team that knows every guest by name before they arrive.
about.modelP2: This means the home is always ready. The garden is always maintained. The pool is always clean. The linens are always hotel grade. When a guest arrives, the house feels like it has been waiting for them. Because it has.
about.value1Body: We say no to most properties we visit. Every home has been personally inspected, tested, and approved. We look for character, functionality, and emotional impact. Not just square metres.
about.value2Body: Our team lives in the regions where we operate. We do not manage from a distance. We are on the ground, building relationships with the best chefs, guides, and artisans for years before they become famous.
about.value3Body: The best hospitality is the kind you barely notice. Everything works because our team has anticipated what you need before you express it. That is not magic. It is preparation, training, and attention.
about.value4Body: We will always tell you the truth about a property. Its strengths and its limitations. We would rather lose a booking than disappoint a guest.
about.teamBody: Temos uma equipa dedicada de profissionais treinados, desde chefs até especialistas em limpeza, todos comprometidos com a excelência.

services.heroTitle: Designed for you. Delivered by us.
services.heroBody: Every experience is arranged by our concierge and delivered by trained Portugal Active professionals. No outsourcing. No intermediaries. One team, one standard.
services.gastronomyBody: Our chefs are Portugal Active professionals. Trained in our standards, equipped with the best regional ingredients, and available in every home. From an intimate dinner for two to a feast for sixteen. Portuguese cuisine, Mediterranean tasting menus, or something built entirely around your preferences. Wine pairings sourced from producers we know personally.
services.wellnessBody: Professional therapists, yoga instructors, and personal trainers. All part of the Portugal Active team. Every session is designed around you: your schedule, your space, your goals. By the pool, in the garden, on the terrace. No spa reception. No shared changing rooms. Just you and the sound of wherever you happen to be.
services.adventureBody: Aulas de surf, passeios a cavalo, canyoning, escalada. Guiado pelos melhores locais.
services.mobilityTitle: From landing to leaving, we drive.
services.mobilityBody: Private transfers from Porto, Lisbon, Faro, and Vigo. Premium vehicles, local drivers who know the roads. Add your flight details and we handle the rest.
services.additionalBody: From grocery delivery to daily housekeeping to childcare. Every detail managed so you can focus on being present.
services.ctaBody: Tell us about your trip and our concierge will design the perfect combination. Reply guaranteed within 2 hours.

events.heroBody: From intimate weddings to corporate retreats, our properties and team are ready to host your next event in Portugal.
events.whyVenueBody: Private homes across Portugal. Each one inspected, prepared, and ready to host.
events.whyTeamBody: In house chefs, coordinators, housekeeping, and concierge. No outsourcing.
events.whyExperienceBody: We have hosted 200+ events. We know what works and what to avoid.
events.ctaBody: Our event team works with you from concept to execution. Tell us your vision and we handle every detail.

faq.title: Perguntas Frequentes
faq.subtitle: Respostas às perguntas mais comuns.
faq.q1: Qual é a política de cancelamento?
faq.a1: As políticas variam dependendo da tarifa selecionada. Tarifas flexíveis permitem cancelamento gratuito até à data especificada. Tarifas não reembolsáveis não permitem cancelamentos.
faq.a2: Sim! Todos os nossos alojamentos podem acomodar um chef privado. Contacte o seu concierge para discussão de menus e orçamento.
faq.a3: A estadia mínima varia de alojamento para alojamento, mas geralmente é de 2-7 noites durante a alta temporada e 1-3 noites fora de pico.
faq.a4: Limpeza de saída está incluída em todas as reservas. Limpeza diária pode ser adicionada como complemento.
faq.q5: Podem os animais de estimação ficar?
faq.a5: Alguns dos nossos alojamentos são amigos de animais. Mencione isto ao reservar ou contacte o seu concierge.
faq.q6: Check in and check out times?
faq.a6: Check in from 16:00. Check out by 11:00. Early check in and late check out may be available. Ask your concierge.
faq.a7: Yes. Private transfers from Porto (OPO), Lisbon (LIS), Faro (FAO), and Vigo (VGO). Premium vehicles with local drivers. Add to your itinerary with flight details.
faq.q8: Are your homes suitable for events?
faq.a8: Several properties are ideal for events, celebrations, retreats, and weddings. Visit our Events page or contact our team. We handle catering, setup, entertainment, and logistics through our in house team.
faq.q9: What is the best rate guarantee?
faq.a9: Our website always offers the lowest available rate. Booking direct means lower price than any third party platform, priority concierge support, faster response, and first access to in house services.
faq.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?

adventures.title: Aventuras
adventures.subtitle: Experimente o melhor de Portugal.
adventures.noAdventures: No adventures available for this destination yet. Try another region.
adventures.customBody: Our team can arrange bespoke adventures tailored to your group.

careers.title: Carreiras
careers.body: We're building something special — a hospitality company that combines the warmth of Portuguese culture with world-class service standards. If you share our passion for exceptional guest experiences, we'd love to hear from you.
careers.lookingTitle: We're always looking for exceptional people
careers.lookingBody: Even if we don't have a specific opening right now, we're always interested in hearing from talented individuals who are passionate about hospitality, travel, and creating memorable experiences.
careers.sendCv: Send us your CV and a short note about why you'd be a great fit.

owners.heroTitle: Your home. Our management. Exceptional results.
owners.heroBody: We manage private homes across Portugal to hotel standards. More revenue, less effort, and guests who treat your property with respect.
owners.whatWeDoTitle: End to end management. Nothing left to chance.
owners.whatWeDoBody: We do not just list your property. We operate it. Our team handles every aspect of management so you receive consistent income without the operational burden.
owners.service1Body: We handle everything. Housekeeping, maintenance, linen service, pool care, garden upkeep, and all guest communications. You do not need to be involved in day to day operations.
owners.service2Body: Dynamic pricing, channel management, and direct booking strategy. We maximise your occupancy and average daily rate while protecting your property from the wrong type of guest.
owners.service3Body: From pre arrival communication to check out, our concierge team manages every touchpoint. We deliver hotel standard service so guests leave 5 star reviews.
owners.service4Body: Monthly reports with occupancy, revenue, expenses, and guest feedback. You always know exactly how your property is performing.
owners.howItWorksTitle: From assessment to operations in 4 weeks.
owners.step1Body: We visit your property, assess its potential, and give you an honest projection of annual revenue and occupancy.
owners.step2Body: Photography, listing creation, pricing setup, and staff assignment. We prepare your property to our standard within 4 weeks.
owners.step3Body: Your property goes live on our platform and selected channels. Our team manages everything from day one.
owners.step4Body: Monthly calls, transparent reporting, and continuous improvement. We treat your property as if it were our own.
owners.portalBody: Access your dashboard, reports, and calendar on our management platform.
owners.formBody: Tell us about your property. We will get back to you within 24 hours with an honest projection and next steps.
owners.formSuccessBody: Our team will review your property and be in touch within 48 hours.
owners.formDescriptionPh: Bedrooms, pool, outdoor space, current rental history...

notFound.title: Página Não Encontrada
notFound.body: This page does not exist. But we know a few places that do.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: Portugal Active operates as a property management and hospitality company. We manage private homes on behalf of property owners and provide booking, concierge, and experience services to guests.
terms.s2Body: All bookings are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices displayed on our website are indicative and may vary based on season, duration, and services requested. Final pricing is confirmed at the time of booking.
terms.s3Body: Cancellation policies vary by property and season. Full details are provided at the time of booking. We recommend reviewing the specific cancellation terms before confirming your reservation.
terms.s4Body: Guests are expected to treat properties with respect and care. Any damage beyond normal wear and tear may result in charges to the security deposit. Smoking is prohibited in all properties unless otherwise stated.
terms.s5Body: Portugal Active acts as a management company and is not liable for circumstances beyond our control, including but not limited to natural events, utility failures, or third-party service disruptions. We carry comprehensive insurance and will always work to resolve any issues promptly.
terms.s6Body: For questions about these terms, please contact us at info@portugalactive.com or +351 927 161 771.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you make a booking enquiry, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and travel preferences.
privacy.s2Body: We use the information we collect to process your bookings, communicate with you about your stay, send marketing communications (with your consent), and improve our services.
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with property owners and service providers solely for the purpose of fulfilling your booking and delivering the services you have requested.
privacy.s4Body: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data. You may also withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time. Contact us at info@portugalactive.com to exercise these rights.
privacy.s5Body: For any privacy-related questions, please contact us at info@portugalactive.com or +351 927 161 771.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.whatBody: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences, understanding how you use our site, and improving our services.
cookiesPage.howBody: Portugal Active uses the following types of cookies:
cookiesPage.essentialBody: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic features like page navigation, access to secure areas, and itinerary functionality. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookiesPage.analyticsBody: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. This helps us improve our site's structure, content, and user experience. All data collected is anonymous and aggregated.
cookiesPage.functionalBody: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make (such as your preferred language or region) and provide enhanced, personalised features. They may also be used to remember changes you have made to text size, fonts, and other customisable elements.
cookiesPage.marketingBody: We may use marketing cookies to deliver advertisements that are relevant to you. These cookies track your browsing habits and help us show you content and offers that match your interests. We only use these with your explicit consent.
cookiesPage.managingBody: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse or accept cookies, delete existing cookies, and set preferences for certain websites. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookiesPage.thirdPartyBody: Some cookies on our website are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. These include analytics providers and social media platforms. We do not control these cookies and recommend reviewing the respective third-party privacy policies.
cookiesPage.updatesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our data practices. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
cookiesPage.contactBody: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at info@portugalactive.com.

blogArticle.ctaBody: Every article is inspired by real places, real experiences, and real guests. Explore our collection and start planning your stay.
